title: Today's Tech Brief: Technology platforms keep shifting around infrastructure
summary: A look at the latest tech news, including platform shifts, infrastructure, and cloud economics.

body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to Today's Tech Brief. I've been digging through the latest tech news, and I found some interesting developments that I want to share with you. It seems like technology platforms are constantly shifting around infrastructure, and it's fascinating to see how this affects cloud economics, security, and product strategy.

Also on the board, there's been some drama around cybersecurity firm Okta, which recently suffered a major breach. What's interesting here is how the company's infrastructure was compromised, and what it says about the state of security in the tech industry. It's a sobering reminder that even the biggest players can get caught off guard.

My quick read: today's tech stories are less about one giant thunderclap and more about a lively weather pattern. A little platform drama here, a little artificial intelligence irony there, and suddenly the industry has enough material for a very caffeinated morning show.
